section_name: Conformity with General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight
chapter_title: Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 622. Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 622.043 — Conformity with General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight

The width, height, and gross weight of a vehicle or combination of vehicles subject to this subchapter shall conform to Chapter 621 (General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The width, height, and gross weight of a vehicle or combination of vehicles subject to this subchapter shall conform to Chapter 621 (General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight) .
